name: github-multi-account
description: Transparent gh CLI proxy that auto-routes commands to the correct GitHub account based on repo context. Uses GH_CONFIG_DIR isolation with auto-detection, token health monitoring, and git credential integration.
author: tamirdresher

files.SKILL.md: AI skill document — agents read this to understand the proxy
files.gh-proxy.ps1: Transparent gh function, routing table, and token health monitor
files.setup.ps1: One-time setup: installs proxy to $PROFILE, configures git credential helper

changelog.2.0.0: Replaced gh auth switch aliases with transparent GH_CONFIG_DIR proxy. Added token health monitor (Test-GhTokenHealth, Repair-GhToken). Added git credential helper integration. Based on Picard's Decision: GH Auth Proxy.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with gh auth switch aliases (ghp/ghw)
